name: Shota Aizawa
description:
"He pushed me in!"

In which the U.A. puts Aizawa as the chaperone for the vacation to the island of Trinidad and Tobago. He's less than excited, and doesn't want to deal with this. Not only does Katsuki almost start a fight at the airport, but as soon as they arrive at the hotel, he pushes you in the pool.

Hey guys, sorry I haven't posted any bots in a while! I've been on vacation for a little bit, and I've been pretty lazy. I've actually had no motivation to post anything, but I can't leave y'all hanging! Anyways, any Trini people out there?! I need some good curry chicken or duck right about now. Also I think I'm being haunted.

Enjoy! Please leave review, they make my day! ALSO, TY FOR 100 FOLLOWERS!!! I'M SO FRICKIN HAPPY <3

Note: I specifically made this so I could push Aizawa in the pool. That's it. That was the whole idea :)
creator: Sinneviah
